rulings.Case Title: NARASIMHA D RAO ET AL VS. HENRY TANG ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Not Of Mot And Mot For Leave To File First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 02, 2017 line 4. PLAINTIFFs NARASIMHA RAO and ASHAPURNA GHOSH's Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint GRANTED. Parties shall request a 60-day trial continuance in department 206. Discovery is re-opened (tracking new trial date) for Defendant to obtain discovery as to the new allegations only. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: NARASIMHA D RAO ET AL VS. HENRY TANG ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 02, 2017 line 4. PLAINTIFFs NARASIMHA RAO and ASHAPURNA GHOSH's MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS DENIED. Cause of action for declaratory relief is not moot at this time. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: OREGON MUTUAL INSURANCE COMPANY VS. BRUCE I. GILBERT ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Sunset Scavenger Company'S Demurrer To Plaintiff'S First Amended Complaint For Subrogation
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 02, 2017 line 5. Defendant Sunset Scavenger Company'S Demurrer To Plaintiff'S First Amended Complaint For Subrogation Sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege in good faith facts (not conclusions) as to each element of negligence and strict liability causes of action, including duty, breach of duty, defective condition, etc. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PATRICE DARK ET AL VS. PAUL THIBEAULT ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 02, 2017 line 6. DEFENDANT PAUL THIBEAULT's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT Continued to November 15, 2017 on Court's own motion. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: HECTOR BARRERA VS. RUSHMORE LOAN MANAGEMENT SERVICES ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 02, 2017 line 7. DEFENDANT RUSHMORE LOAN MANAGEMENT SERVICES' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OFF CALENDAR. On October 3, 2017 in its tentative ruling the Court alerted the moving party that the moving party failed to provide a courtesy copy of the moving papers (opposing party was informed that the courtesy copy of opposition has not been provided either). Moving party failed to provide a courtesy copy of the operative complaint to this date. In accordance with SFLR 2.7B this demurrer is ordered off calendar. = (501/REQ)
